title: [Origin Realms] BABY TOOLSKINS
description: Replaces large toolskins on the Origin Realms server with 16x16 versions!
body:
**Note: This Resource Pack is meant to be used on [Origin Realms](https://originrealms.com/). If you do not play on the server, then this pack is not relevant to you.**

# Origin Realms: Baby Toolskins
With the 2024 Summer Event/Crate Overhaul update, the Atlantean Toolskins were introduced. They were redesigned to use a larger texture than previous toolskins, with a larger held model. Not everyone has been a fan of this change, with some asking for the textures to be redone to 16x16.

Because I am someone who prefers the 16x16 textures, I am not a huge fan of the otherwise really cool toolskins. Because of this, I made this resource pack, and I want to share it for everyone to use!

If more large toolskins are added, I will update this Resource Pack to include them. If you find any issues/bugs, please DM me through the Origin Realms Discord!

*This mod requires the [Server Pack Unlocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/server-pack-unlocker) mod or another mod that supports this feature. I recommend the [ORStash](https://orstash.com/) mod (downloadable from the ORStash discord), as it is specifically for Origin Realms and has other helpful features!*

**INCLUDED TOOLSKINS:**
- Atlantean Sword, Axe, Pickaxe
- *Shields are not included in this Resource Pack, as they use entirely different models and textures.*
